'''dasodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:praelectorship|praelectorship]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-s-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:praelectorship|praelectorship]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dasodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæsedeth|dæsedeth]] || [[word:dæsedej|dæsedej]] || [[word:dæsedesh|dæsedesh]] || [[word:dæsede|dæsede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dasosodoth|dasosodoth]] || [[word:dasosodoj|dasosodoj]] || [[word:dasosodosh|dasosodosh]] || [[word:dasosodo|dasosodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dasodoth|dasodoth]] || [[word:dasodoj|dasodoj]] || [[word:dasodosh|dasodosh]] || [[word:dasodo|dasodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dasofdoth|dasofdoth]] || [[word:dasofdoj|dasofdoj]] || [[word:dasofdosh|dasofdosh]] || [[word:dasofdof|dasofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dasodotho|dasodotho]] || [[word:dasodojo|dasodojo]] || [[word:dasodosho|dasodosho]] || [[word:dasodoko|dasodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dasodoth|dasodoth]] || [[word:dasodoj|dasodoj]] || [[word:dasodosh|dasodosh]] || [[word:dasodo|dasodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dasodothol|dasodothol]] || [[word:dasodojol|dasodojol]] || [[word:dasodoshol|dasodoshol]] || [[word:dasodokol|dasodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dasodothotho|dasodothotho]] || [[word:dasodojojo|dasodojojo]] || [[word:dasodoshosho|dasodoshosho]] || [[word:dasodoko|dasodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dasodothon|dasodothon]] || [[word:dasodojon|dasodojon]] || [[word:dasodoshon|dasodoshon]] || [[word:dasodokon|dasodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dasodothoro|dasodothoro]] || [[word:dasodojoro|dasodojoro]] || [[word:dasodoshoro|dasodoshoro]] || [[word:dasodokoro|dasodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
